title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!
